content.text: NC Hurricane Florence 2020 NOAA Topo / Bathy and USGS LiDAR 8ppsm Collected in the Dec 2019 to Feb 2020 time frame * This data is not yet available on NC Spatial Data Download ** DEMs are being processed as 3, 5, 10, 20, and 50ft cell hydro-flattened countywide mosaics. The 3, 5, and 20ft DEM mosaics will be tiled to the NC 100 scale GRID

content.caption: April 9, 2024 NCEM Status

content.text: Emergency Management NC DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC SAFETY
NC Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) Elevation Data
Data collection has been completed in Phase 3

content.description: A map of North Carolina divided by phases with quality levels (QL), an inset showing LiDAR technology, and an EMAP accreditation logo.
content.caption: North Carolina LiDAR Quality Level By Phase. Phase & Quality: Phase 1 (2020) - QL 1, Phase 2 (2020) - QL 1, Phase 3 (2015) - QL 2, Phase 4 (2016) - QL 1, Phase 5 (2017) - QL 1. QL 1 data collection planned for early 2024. QL = Quality Level.

content.text: • **Project Timeline:** LiDAR data collection will be performed during leaf-off conditions (January – March). The estimated delivery dates for the processing and classification and all products would proceed as follows (Table 5):

cells.text: Table 5. The estimated delivery dates for the processing and classification and all products
When the Acquisition phase is actually conducted
Processing calibration and classification would be delivered on an incremental schedule until the beginning of:
All products and deliverables should be available by beginning of:
November -December of the same year as data acquisition
February (of the following year of acquisition)

content.text: **Note:** Quality control would be performed with all deliverables.
